methodology: Each dimension scored based on code review evidence and component test results

evidence.testability: Regex-based scoring works. Threshold 0.3 is very permissive. Scores observed: 0.7-0.95
evidence.specificity: Min 15 chars is too low. LLM generates specific hypotheses (measurable predictions) but no enforcement
evidence.novelty: NoveltyChecker exists (250+ lines) with semantic similarity + literature search BUT never called from agents/hypothesis_generator.py or agents/research_director.py. novelty_score always None from generator
evidence.literature_grounding: Literature search works (5 papers returned, S2+arXiv+PubMed). Papers used in prompt context when use_literature_context=True, but keyword-based not semantic

gap_notes: NoveltyChecker dead in runtime path (kosmos/hypothesis/novelty_checker.py)
require_novelty_check config exists but never checked (hypothesis_generator.py:82)
novelty_score set by LLM, not by dedicated analyzer

evidence.controls: Inline _validate_protocol() checks exist (experiment_designer.py:625-661) but generate warnings only, don't block execution
evidence.power_analysis: PowerAnalyzer exists (525 lines) with t-test/ANOVA/correlation/regression/chi-square BUT never called from experiment_designer.py. require_power_analysis config set but unused
evidence.test_selection: check_assumptions() exists in statistics.py BUT never called during execution
evidence.confounds: Not implemented. No confound detection system
evidence.protocol_quality: Experiment designer fell back to LLM and produced unnamed protocol with 0 steps, no controls, no stats in Phase 2 test

gap_notes: ExperimentValidator dead in runtime path (kosmos/experiments/validator.py)
PowerAnalyzer dead in runtime path (kosmos/experiments/statistical_power.py)
Inline validator is 37 lines vs comprehensive validator's ~500 lines
Experiment design produced empty protocol in component test

evidence.provenance: CodeProvenance system exists with hyperlinks. _data_source variable set in templates
evidence.quality: Only dropna() - no outlier detection, no range checks, no missing data imputation
evidence.synthetic_disclosure: _data_source set to 'synthetic' in generated code BUT NOT propagated to ExperimentResult or reports
evidence.data_input: NO --data-path CLI flag. NO DataProvider.load_user_data(). Paper's core workflow (objective + dataset) completely unsupported
evidence.effect_size: Hardcoded 0.5 in TTestComparisonCodeTemplate (code_generator.py:112). Guarantees significant results

gap_notes: No dataset input mechanism - paper's CORE innovation is missing
Synthetic data always effect_size=0.5 creating circular validation
_data_source not returned in execution results
Reports cannot distinguish synthetic from real data

evidence.test_correctness: StatisticalValidator has t-test, ANOVA, chi-square, correlation, Mann-Whitney. check_assumptions() exists but never called in runtime
evidence.multiple_comparison: Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg, Holm-Bonferroni methods exist in statistics.py BUT not auto-applied across research loop
evidence.effect_sizes: Cohen's d calculated in templates. Hardcoded thresholds: small<0.3, medium<0.8, large>=0.8
evidence.confidence_intervals: Parametric CI method exists. Inconsistently called
evidence.code_template_bug: TTestComparisonCodeTemplate produces code that fails with NameError: name 'df' is not defined

gap_notes: check_assumptions() defined but never called (statistics.py:586-639)
Multiple comparison correction not applied across research loop iterations
Code template bug makes execution fail

evidence.claims_match_evidence: supports_hypothesis determined by LLM interpretation (data_analyst.py:326), not formal criteria. Result collector has formal check (p<0.05 AND |d|>0.2) but it's a SEPARATE code path
evidence.limitations: LLM generates limitation text, but it's generic boilerplate not experiment-specific
evidence.overclaiming: No overclaiming detector. LLM set hypothesis_supported=True with confidence=0.85 in Phase 2 test
evidence.anomaly_detection: Anomaly detection config exists (anomaly_detection_enabled=True) but Phase 2 anomaly test not run due to time constraints

gap_notes: LLM can affirm synthetic data results (circular reasoning)
No formal overclaiming prevention
Two parallel systems for supports_hypothesis (LLM-based and formal) not reconciled

evidence.code_traceability: CodeProvenance works well for template-generated code (hyperlinks, citations)
evidence.seeds: default_random_seed=42 in config. ReproducibilityManager.set_seed() method exists. Multiple independent seed paths not synchronized
evidence.replication: test_determinism() exists but never called from workflow. Would enable multi-run consistency testing
evidence.config_issue: LITELLM_MODEL env var not loaded by config system - defaults to gpt-3.5-turbo despite deepseek in .env

gap_notes: test_determinism() dead code in workflow
Config env var loading bug means model selection is unreliable
Multiple seed paths not synchronized
